name: Guangxi Guiguan Electric PowerCo.,Ltd.
summary: Guangxi Guiguan Electric PowerCo.,Ltd. engages in the generation of electricity in China. As of December 31, 2018, it had an installed capacity of 11.8381 million kilowatts, including 10.26 million kilowatts of hydropower, 1.33 million kilowatts of thermal power, and 281,500 kilowatts of wind power. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Nanning, China. Guangxi Guiguan Electric PowerCo.,Ltd. is a subsidiary of China Datang Corporation.
